executiveSummary.text: Costco is a high-quality membership-driven retail compounding machine with exceptional pricing power and customer loyalty metrics that are the envy of the retail sector. The 51.19x P/E reflects precisely this quality — the market prices in near-perfect execution and the continuation of the membership fee model that generates enormous float. Q4 and FY2025 results confirmed the thesis: traffic remains robust, e-commerce grows, and the gold star membership conversion rate continues to improve. The risk is not the business model — it is the entry price. At $982.97, 8% below the 52-week high and pricing in 51x earnings, there is very little margin of safety for a new investor. OPPORTUNISTIC BUY reflects that Costco is genuinely excellent but not cheap.
